See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 3851 => 'Zagreb', 38520 => 'Dubrovnik-Neretva', 38521 => 'Split-Dalmatia', 38522 => 'Šibenik-Knin', 38523 => 'Zadar', 38531 => 'Osijek-Baranja', 38532 => 'Vukovar-Srijem', 38533 => 'Virovitica-Podravina', 38534 => 'Požega-Slavonia', 38535 => 'Brod-Posavina', 38540 => 'Međimurje', 38542 => 'Varaždin', 38543 => 'Bjelovar-Bilogora', 38544 => 'Sisak-Moslavina', 38547 => 'Karlovac', 38548 => 'Koprivnica-Križevci', 38549 => 'Krapina-Zagorje', 38551 => 'Primorsko-goranska', 38552 => 'Istra', 38553 => 'Lika-Senj', ];
